# Wise: The international account | Money without borders | Wise India — Design System

## Accessibility — Contrast Ratios

Computed between the most-used text and background color pairs.
WCAG 2.1 thresholds: **AA** ≥ 4.5:1 (normal text), **AA Large** ≥ 3:1 (large/bold text), **AAA** ≥ 7:1.

| Text Token | Background Token | Ratio | WCAG Rating |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--color-dark-gray` | `--color-dark-green` | 1.49:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray` | `--color-dark-green-2` | 1.48:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray` | `--color-black` | 2.24:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray` | `--color-green` | 6.36:1 | AA |
| `--color-dark-gray` | `--color-white` | 9.37:1 | AAA |
| `--color-dark-gray-2` | `--color-dark-green` | 1.38:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray-2` | `--color-dark-green-2` | 1.39:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray-2` | `--color-black` | 1.09:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-gray-2` | `--color-green` | 13.05:1 | AAA |
| `--color-dark-gray-2` | `--color-white` | 19.23:1 | AAA |
| `--color-dark-blue` | `--color-dark-green` | 1.52:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-blue` | `--color-dark-green-2` | 1.51:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-blue` | `--color-black` | 2.29:1 | Fail |
| `--color-dark-blue` | `--color-green` | 6.22:1 | AA |
| `--color-dark-blue` | `--color-white` | 9.17:1 | AAA |
| `--color-light-gray` | `--color-dark-green` | 11.58:1 | AAA |
| `--color-light-gray` | `--color-dark-green-2` | 11.5:1 | AAA |
| `--color-light-gray` | `--color-black` | 17.46:1 | AAA |
| `--color-light-gray` | `--color-green` | 1.22:1 | Fail |
| `--color-light-gray` | `--color-white` | 1.2:1 | Fail |
| `--color-mid-gray` | `--color-dark-green` | 2.63:1 | Fail |
| `--color-mid-gray` | `--color-dark-green-2` | 2.61:1 | Fail |
| `--color-mid-gray` | `--color-black` | 3.97:1 | AA Large |
| `--color-mid-gray` | `--color-green` | 3.59:1 | AA Large |
| `--color-mid-gray` | `--color-white` | 5.3:1 | AA |

| `--mw-space-1` | `clamp(0.25rem,calc(0.23558rem + 0.0641vw),0.3125rem)` |

| `--mw-space-3` | `clamp(0.75rem,calc(0.70673rem + 0.19231vw),0.9375rem)` |
| `--mw-space-4` | `clamp(1rem,calc(0.94231rem + 0.25641vw),1.25rem)` |
| `--mw-space-6` | `clamp(1.5rem,calc(1.41346rem + 0.38462vw),1.875rem)` |
| `--mw-space-8` | `clamp(2rem,calc(1.88462rem + 0.51282vw),2.5rem)` |
| `--mw-space-12` | `clamp(3rem,calc(2.82692rem + 0.76923vw),3.75rem)` |
| `--mw-space-16` | `clamp(4rem,calc(3.76923rem + 1.02564vw),5rem)` |
| `--mw-space-24` | `clamp(6rem,calc(5.65385rem + 1.53846vw),7.5rem)` |
| `--mw-space-32` | `clamp(8rem,calc(7.53846rem + 2.05128vw),10rem)` |
| `--coin-colour` | `#9fe870` |
| `--coin-size` | `4.5rem` |
| `--coins-image` | `url("data:image/png;base64,")` |
| `--navigation-mobile-tertiary-height` | `66px` |
| `--navigation-mobile-item-height` | `var(--size-48)` |
| `--navigation-container` | `1440px` |
| `--navigation-mobile-horizontal-space` | `var(--eds-space-8,var(--mw-space-8))` |
| `--navigation-mobile-dialog-margin` | `var(--eds-space-4,var(--mw-space-4))` |
| `--navigation-skiplink-zindex` | `1080` |
| `--navigation-mobile-primary-zindex` | `1049` |
| `--navigation-mobile-secondary-dropdown-zindex` | `1049` |
| `--navigation-mobile-secondary-zindex` | `1047` |
| `--color-background-neutral-solid` | `#edeeec` |
| `--navigation-box-shadow` | `0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.16)` |
| `--navigation-color-background-interactive-hover` | `rgba(211,242,192,0.4)` |
| `--navigation-animation-duration` | `350ms` |
| `--navigation-animation-duration-short` | `200ms` |
| `--navigation-animation-duration-long` | `600ms` |
| `--navigation-transition-timing-function` | `cubic-bezier(0.8,0.05,0.2,0.95)` |
| `--navigation-desktop-primary-height` | `76px` |
| `--navigation-desktop-secondary-height` | `58px` |
| `--navigation-desktop-primary-button-height` | `var(--size-32)` |
| `--navigation-desktop-primary-vertical-padding` | `22px` |
| `--navigation-desktop-primary-panel-zindex` | `1070` |
| `--navigation-desktop-viewport-zindex` | `1060` |
| `--navigation-desktop-primary-zindex` | `1050` |
| `--navigation-desktop-dimmer-zindex` | `1040` |
| `--navigation-desktop-secondary-dropdown-zindex` | `1000` |
| `--navigation-desktop-secondary-zindex` | `990` |
| `--radix-navigation-menu-viewport-height` | `0px` |
| `--eds-radius-full` | `50%` |
| `--eds-radius-1` | `clamp(0.625rem,calc(0.58894rem + 0.16026vw),0.78125rem)` |
| `--eds-radius-2` | `clamp(1rem,calc(0.94231rem + 0.25641vw),1.25rem)` |
| `--eds-radius-3` | `clamp(1.5rem,calc(1.41346rem + 0.38462vw),1.875rem)` |
| `--eds-radius-4` | `clamp(2rem,calc(1.88462rem + 0.51282vw),2.5rem)` |
| `--eds-radius-6` | `clamp(3rem,calc(2.82692rem + 0.76923vw),3.75rem)` |
| `--eds-space-1` | `clamp(0.25rem,calc(0.23558rem + 0.0641vw),0.3125rem)` |
| `--eds-space-2` | `clamp(0.5rem,calc(0.47115rem + 0.12821vw),0.625rem)` |
| `--eds-space-3` | `clamp(0.75rem,calc(0.70673rem + 0.19231vw),0.9375rem)` |
| `--eds-space-4` | `clamp(1rem,calc(0.94231rem + 0.25641vw),1.25rem)` |
| `--eds-space-6` | `clamp(1.5rem,calc(1.41346rem + 0.38462vw),1.875rem)` |
| `--eds-space-8` | `clamp(2rem,calc(1.88462rem + 0.51282vw),2.5rem)` |
| `--eds-space-12` | `clamp(3rem,calc(2.82692rem + 0.76923vw),3.75rem)` |
| `--eds-space-16` | `clamp(4rem,calc(3.76923rem + 1.02564vw),5rem)` |
| `--eds-space-24` | `clamp(6rem,calc(5.65385rem + 1.53846vw),7.5rem)` |
| `--eds-space-32` | `clamp(8rem,calc(7.53846rem + 2.05128vw),10rem)` |
| `--color-background-celebration` | `#0e4242` |
| `--color-content-celebration` | `#a0e1e1` |

---

## Design Tokens (CSS Variables)

Paste this `:root` block into your project to use all extracted tokens as CSS custom properties.

```css
/* ============================================
 * Design Tokens — Wise: The international account | Money without borders | Wise India
 * Source: https://wise.com/in/?utm_source=google&matchtype=e&device=c&userlocation=1007749&keyword=wise&campaignid=21842513458&adgroupid=176102742944&utm_campaign=21842513458___176102742944&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=21842513458&gbraid=0AAAAADqE2bAgJKdpCpHrFYEX9pDmbf-9u&gclid=CjwKCAjw14zPBhAuEiwAP3-Eb2O4H3OP4w_yQGMptEmpdbofRkdP-d772W1AClQEcntreflzXGmMzxoChm0QAvD_BwE
 * Generated: 18/04/2026, 14:18:14
 * ============================================ */

:root {
  /* ── Core: Colors ── */
  --color-dark-gray: #454745; /* hsl(120, 1%, 27%) · text */
  --color-dark-green: #163300; /* hsl(94, 100%, 10%) · background */
  --color-dark-gray-2: #0E0F0C; /* hsl(80, 11%, 5%) · text */
  --color-dark-green-2: rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.08); /* hsl(89, 100%, 10%) · background */
  --color-black: #000000; /* hsl(0, 0%, 0%) · background */
  --color-green: #9FE870; /* hsl(97, 72%, 67%) · background */
  --color-dark-blue: #0B4C72; /* hsl(202, 82%, 25%) · text */
  --color-light-gray: #E8EBE6; /* hsl(96, 11%, 91%) · text */
  --color-white: #FFFFFF; /* hsl(0, 0%, 100%) · background */
  --color-black-2: rgba(14, 15, 12, 0.12) rgb(69, 71, 69) rgb(69, 71, 69); /* hsl(60, 33%, 5%) · background */
  --color-dark-green-3: rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.2); /* hsl(96, 100%, 10%) · background */
  --color-mid-gray: #6A6C6A; /* hsl(120, 1%, 42%) · text */
  --color-dark-green-4: rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.12); /* hsl(89, 100%, 10%) · border */
  --color-light-cyan: #A0E1E1; /* hsl(180, 52%, 75%) · background */
  --color-white-2: #ECF9F9; /* hsl(180, 52%, 95%) · background */
  --color-mid-gray-2: #808080; /* hsl(0, 0%, 50%) · text */
  --color-mid-gray-3: #868685; /* hsl(60, 0%, 52%) · border */
  --color-light-gray-2: #ECEFEB; /* hsl(105, 11%, 93%) · gradient */

  /* ── Core: Typography ── */
  --font-size-2xs: 14px;
  --font-size-xs: 16px;
  --font-size-sm: 17.2368px;
  --font-size-base: 18px;
  --font-size-lg: 19.2368px;
  --font-size-xl: 20px;
  --font-size-2xl: 22.4737px;
  --font-size-3xl: 40px;
  --font-size-4xl: 40.0921px;
  --font-size-5xl: 50px;
  --font-size-6xl: 52.1841px;
  --font-size-72px: 72.2632px;
  --font-size-81px: 80.7369px;
  --font-family-base: Inter;
  --font-family-2: Wise Sans;
  --font-weight-regular: 400;
  --font-weight-medium: 500;
  --font-weight-semibold: 600;
  --font-weight-black: 900;
  --line-height-tight: 18.4px;
  --line-height-snug: 20px;
  --line-height-normal: 21px;
  --line-height-relaxed: 21.7px;
  --line-height-loose: 24px;
  --line-height-lh-6: 26px;
  --line-height-lh-7: 28px;
  --line-height-lh-8: 32px;
  --line-height-lh-9: 34px;
  --line-height-lh-10: 44.3565px;
  --line-height-lh-11: 57px;
  --line-height-lh-12: 61.4237px;
  --line-height-lh-13: 68.6264px;
  --line-height-lh-14: 75px;
  --letter-spacing-tight: -1.20276px;
  --letter-spacing-normal: -0.337106px;
  --letter-spacing-wide: -0.22px;
  --letter-spacing-wider: -0.176px;
  --letter-spacing-widest: -0.154px;
  --letter-spacing-ls-6: -0.108px;
  --letter-spacing-ls-7: -0.084px;
  --letter-spacing-ls-8: 0.08px;
  --letter-spacing-ls-9: 0.096184px;
  --letter-spacing-ls-10: 0.172368px;

  /* ── Layout: Spacing ── */
  --space-1: 2px;
  --space-2: 3px;
  --space-3: 4px;
  --space-4: 4.49553px;
  --space-5: 5px;
  --space-6: 6.4px;
  --space-8: 8px;
  --space-10: 8.99102px;
  --space-12: 11px;
  --space-16: 12px;
  --space-20: 13.4866px;
  --space-24: 107.892px;
  --space-32: 17.9821px;
  --space-40: 19px;
  --space-48: 22px;
  --space-64: 24px;
  --space-80: 26.9731px;
  --space-96: 32px;
  --space-128: 35.9642px;
  --space-160: 40px;
  --space-192: 48px;
  --space-256: 53.9461px;
  --space-23: 80px;
  --space-25: 331.969px;

  /* ── Borders ── */
  --border-width-hairline: 1px;
  --border-width-thin: 2px;
  --radius-sm: 2px;
  --radius-md: 8px;
  --radius-lg: 10px;
  --radius-xl: 10px 10px 0px 0px;
  --radius-2xl: 11.2388px;
  --radius-full: 16px;
  --radius-r7: 17.9821px;
  --radius-r8: 26.9731px;
  --radius-r9: 32px 32px 0px 0px;
  --radius-r10: 35.9642px;
  --radius-r11: 50%;
  --radius-r12: 9999px;

  /* ── Surfaces: Shadows ── */
  --shadow-sm: rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px;

  /* ── Motion ── */
  --duration-instant: 0.15s;
  --duration-fast: 0.2s;
  --duration-normal: 0.3s;
  --duration-slow: 0.35s;
  --duration-slower: 1s;
  --easing-ease-in-out: ease-in-out;

  /* ── Layout: Z-Index ── */
  --z-1: -1;
  --z-2: 1;
  --z-3: 1040;
  --z-4: 1049;
  --z-5: 1050;
  --z-6: 1060;
  --z-7: 1070;

  /* ── Breakpoints ── */
  --breakpoint-xs: 320px;
  --breakpoint-sm: 332px;
  --breakpoint-md: 399px;
  --breakpoint-lg: 479.98px;
  --breakpoint-xl: 480px;
  --breakpoint-2xl: 481px;
  --breakpoint-3xl: 566px;
  --breakpoint-bp-8: 575px;
  --breakpoint-bp-9: 575.98px;
  --breakpoint-bp-10: 576px;
  --breakpoint-bp-11: 592px;
  --breakpoint-bp-12: 596px;
  --breakpoint-bp-13: 767px;
  --breakpoint-bp-14: 767.98px;
  --breakpoint-bp-15: 768px;
  --breakpoint-bp-16: 770px;
  --breakpoint-bp-17: 991px;
  --breakpoint-bp-18: 991.98px;
  --breakpoint-bp-19: 992px;
  --breakpoint-bp-20: 1199px;
  --breakpoint-bp-21: 1199.98px;
  --breakpoint-bp-22: 1200px;
  --breakpoint-bp-23: 1366px;
  --breakpoint-bp-24: 1439.98px;
  --breakpoint-bp-25: 1440px;
  --breakpoint-bp-26: 1601px;
  --breakpoint-bp-27: 1640px;
  --breakpoint-bp-28: 1920px;

  /* ── Opacity ── */
  --opacity-6: 0.06;
  --opacity-45: 0.45;
  --opacity-94: 0.94;
}
```

---

## Machine-Readable Tokens — DTCG JSON

W3C Design Tokens Community Group format. Compatible with Figma Tokens, Style Dictionary, and similar pipelines.

```json
{
  "$metadata": {
    "source": "https://wise.com/in/?utm_source=google&matchtype=e&device=c&userlocation=1007749&keyword=wise&campaignid=21842513458&adgroupid=176102742944&utm_campaign=21842513458___176102742944&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=21842513458&gbraid=0AAAAADqE2bAgJKdpCpHrFYEX9pDmbf-9u&gclid=CjwKCAjw14zPBhAuEiwAP3-Eb2O4H3OP4w_yQGMptEmpdbofRkdP-d772W1AClQEcntreflzXGmMzxoChm0QAvD_BwE",
    "title": "Wise: The international account | Money without borders | Wise India",
    "generatedAt": "2026-04-18T08:48:14.871Z"
  },
  "core": {
    "color": {
      "dark-gray": {
        "$value": "#454745",
        "$type": "color",
        "$description": "text · ×2480"
      },
      "dark-green": {
        "$value": "#163300",
        "$type": "color",
        "$description": "background · ×1175"
      },
      "dark-gray-2": {
        "$value": "#0E0F0C",
        "$type": "color",
        "$description": "text · ×951"
      },

        "$value": "rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.08)",

        "$description": "background · ×153"
      },

        "$description": "background · ×137"
      },
      "green": {

        "$description": "background · ×40"
      },

        "$value": "#0B4C72",

        "$description": "text · ×24"
      },

      },

  "surfaces": {
    "borderRadius": {
      "radius-sm": {
        "$value": "2px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-md": {
        "$value": "8px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-lg": {
        "$value": "10px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-xl": {
        "$value": "10px 10px 0px 0px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-2xl": {
        "$value": "11.2388px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-full": {
        "$value": "16px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r7": {
        "$value": "17.9821px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r8": {
        "$value": "26.9731px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r9": {
        "$value": "32px 32px 0px 0px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r10": {
        "$value": "35.9642px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r11": {
        "$value": "50%",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "radius-r12": {
        "$value": "9999px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      }
    },
    "borderWidth": {
      "border-width-hairline": {
        "$value": "1px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      },
      "border-width-thin": {
        "$value": "2px",
        "$type": "dimension"
      }
    },
    "shadow": {
      "shadow-sm": {
        "$value": "rgba(22, 51, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px",
        "$type": "shadow"
      }
    }
  },
  "motion": {
    "duration": {
      "duration-instant": {
        "$value": "0.15s",
        "$type": "duration"
      },
      "duration-fast": {
        "$value": "0.2s",
        "$type": "duration"
      },
      "duration-normal": {
        "$value": "0.3s",
        "$type": "duration"
      },
      "duration-slow": {
        "$value": "0.35s",
        "$type": "duration"
      },
      "duration-slower": {
        "$value": "1s",
        "$type": "duration"
      }
    },
    "easing": {
      "easing-ease-in-out": {
        "$value": "ease-in-out",
        "$type": "cubicBezier"
      }
    }
  },
  "opacity": {
    "opacity-6": {
      "$value": 0.06,
      "$type": "number"
    },
    "opacity-45": {
      "$value": 0.45,
      "$type": "number"
    },
    "opacity-94": {
      "$value": 0.94,
      "$type": "number"
    }
  }
}
```
